tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set srcintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstintf "Port2"
set dstaddr "all"
set service "ICMP-service"
set anomaly enable
set icmp-sweep enable
set status enable
set log enable
set tcp-syn-flood disable
set udp-flood disable
set icmp-flood enable
set icmp-flood-rate 100
next
end"}

next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
interface Gi0/1
storm-control broadcast level 5.00 2.50
storm-control action shutdown
exit
interface Gi0/2
storm-control broadcast level 5.00 2.50
storm-control action shutdown
exit
interface Gi0/3
storm-control broadcast level 5.00 2.50
storm-control action shutdown
exit
end
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.

                   ^

                   ^

                   ^

                   ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch(config-if)#exit
Switch(config)#end
